history.content:
<thought>
A goal O is visible in the same row, several cells to my right. The cell directly in front of me is lava, so I should not go forward. Rotating clockwise will orient me toward a safe open path to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible nearby, and I am currently facing upward with a wall directly ahead, so moving forward is impossible. The safest progress toward the goal is to turn counter-clockwise, which should orient me toward the open cells leading left toward the goal area.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible straight ahead and a bit to the right in the local view, but the cell directly in front of me is lava, so I must not go forward. I need to reorient toward a safe path first; turning clockwise will let me avoid the lava and head toward the open floor cells leading around it.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
